h3bad5438gd696g4b81g9869g3b28503be707: Elegant bearing. Saucy voice. The signs were all there.
h9f986669gac84g4fffg8b34g79eb4ee44580: I don't reckon you're hiding anything? A craving for blood? An aversion to stakes?
h57cbb83cge823g4677g83d2g14d0897cbfcd: You can rest easy. I'm no vampire - and Astarion is dead.
hc2896c51g85bcg46adg8980g0eb92529044b: And for that, my neck thanks you. But I fear our supply of cheeky jests may suffer for it.
h5c15047dg0e5ag4ca1gb2a2g45a4dec1d3d1: You can rest easy. I'm no vampire - and Astarion is gone.
h444d0e07g47b5g44cega702g3a0698f2c704: For now, at least. But do be wary of telltale signs like drained corpses or snappy, well-observed quips.
h2261cc11gd9ffg40bfg838dgabae51b9344c: There's plenty you don't know about me.
he6068e1eg5a32g4cc0g87d7gf54912971b71: A man of many secrets. I do hope a taste for blood is not among them.
h4da310b7gdf51g46bbg8c5cg769bebd1dd22: A woman of many secrets. I do hope a taste for blood is not among them.
h2649b2b8g1511g4023gbbaag4c8c2431a656: I had my suspicions about Astarion, truth be told.
hfe9e198ega486g4e73g8239gea3327542c2f: And they went curiously unmentioned. A reasonable oversight, to be fair.
hb496ac87g4ea4g40cfgac58gec0bf21a0129: When a bug's fondling your brain, the truth's not so apparent.
hb4579225gabcag40c4g916cg4463028841d2: He had me fooled - I never even suspected.
h15fe5c72g5121g46deg90d1ga0b6d66d3bf7: We've all secrets buried within. You've unearthed a few of my own.
